# Vibecode.game

> Lightweight index for LLMs — read this first, then fetch only the pages you need.

## What this site is

**Vibecode.game** is a community hub for **vibe-coded and AI-assisted games**: discover browser-friendly indie titles, developer profiles, AI game-dev tools, game jams, guides, and a dedicated glossary of AI game development terms. Operated in connection with **YGG Play** (Yield Guild Games).

**Canonical origin:** https://www.vibecode.game/

## Machine-readable full corpus

For a **single-file dump** of primary English content (no extra HTTP fetches), use:

- https://www.vibecode.game/llms-full.txt  
  *(Generated at build time from the same sources as the site.)*

## Key pages (table of contents)

| Path | Description |
|------|-------------|
| https://www.vibecode.game/ | Home — hub entry, featured games, jams, tools, blog highlights |
| https://www.vibecode.game/vibe-coded-games | Browse vibe-coded games |
| https://www.vibecode.game/vibe-coded-games/best-of-the-week | Curated “best of the week” listings |
| https://www.vibecode.game/vibe-coded-games/most-played | Most played listings |
| https://www.vibecode.game/vibe-coded-games/new-release | New releases |
| https://www.vibecode.game/vibe-coded-games/by-genre | Games filtered by genre |
| https://www.vibecode.game/vibe-coded-games/by-ai-tool | Games filtered by AI tool |
| https://www.vibecode.game/developers | Developer hub / profiles index |
| https://www.vibecode.game/ai-tools | AI tools for game development |
| https://www.vibecode.game/blog | Blog — guides, tooling, community |
| https://www.vibecode.game/game-jams | Game jams index |
| https://www.vibecode.game/game-vibe-coding-glossary | Full glossary (AI & vibe-coding terms for game devs) |
| https://www.vibecode.game/faq | FAQ — common questions on vibe coding & AI games |
| https://www.vibecode.game/about | About |
| https://www.vibecode.game/contact | Contact |
| https://www.vibecode.game/rss.xml | Blog RSS |

## Dynamic / non-content endpoints (usually skip for text ingestion)

- `/api/*` — server routes (see `robots.txt` disallow for crawlers)

## Policies

- **robots.txt:** https://www.vibecode.game/robots.txt  
- **Sitemap:** https://www.vibecode.game/sitemap-index.xml  

## Note on individual game, developer, tool, and jam URLs

Detail pages follow these patterns (replace `{slug}`):

- `https://www.vibecode.game/vibe-coded-games/{slug}`
- `https://www.vibecode.game/developers/{slug}`
- `https://www.vibecode.game/ai-tools/{slug}`
- `https://www.vibecode.game/game-jams/{slug}`
- `https://www.vibecode.game/blog/{slug}`

For an offline-style bundle of **all** primary English markdown/mdx sources, use **llms-full.txt** (link above).
